# Appendix Topic Index

This appendix index provides the purpose of each appendix page and how it supports the main-deck conclusions.

## Appendix A (Slide s42): ARR cohort and retention support
**Purpose:** Provide cohort-level ARR rollforward and retention metrics (gross retention, net revenue retention) that support the revenue quality narrative and durability assessment.

## Appendix B (Slide s43): Payroll analysis and headcount cost bridge
**Purpose:** Support operating expense interpretation (S&M, R&D, G&A) and validate any compensation-related QoE adjustments (severance, retention, contractor usage).  
**Visual status:** `[TABLE IMAGE PLACEHOLDER]` to be replaced with payroll register summary tied to HRIS and payroll reports.

## Appendix C (Slide s44): Capex and capitalized software detail
**Purpose:** Provide transparency on PP&E capex and software development capitalization (by project / function) to support cash conversion and QoE normalization around capitalization policy.

## Appendix D (Slide s45): Debt and lease schedule
**Purpose:** Provide debt/lease maturity profile and key terms that support leverage, net debt, and debt-like discussion in the balance sheet section.
